original: A set of beautifully handcrafted hoop piercings designed by Kiona the korgonne jeweler. The green gem is meticulously smoothed to the point that the glowing material shines against most light sources. While not as potent as the raw material, the psionic radiation from the green jewels will leave your loins constantly warm to the touch. A delicately inscribed ‘KK’ on the inside area of each piercing marks the signature of its expert maker.
